title: vicia villosa subsp. elegantissima
intro: Vicia villosa subsp. elegantissima, also known as hairy vetch, is a subspecies of vetch, a flowering plant in the legume family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of hairy vetch include reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Hairy vetch is often prepared as a herbal tea or used in combination with other herbs to create infusions for various health issues.
